entry.content:
![[Pasted image 20260217191330.png|336]]
Kimbap — 韩国寿司 日本的就叫做onigiri

![[Pasted image 20260217190535.png|273]]

buns -- 面包onigiri --- 饭团

![[Pasted image 20260217191159.png|205]]

soggy--- 受潮"If you don't wrap it correctly, the seaweed will get soggy." （如果你没包好，海苔就会变软，没那种脆感了）slides out  ---滑出侧滑菜单 "The navigation drawer **slides out** from the left."（导航抽屉从左侧滑出。）物理结构比如手机的 SIM 卡槽，The SIM tray **slides out** after you push the pin."（按下针头后，SIM 卡托就滑出来了。）k-drama 韩剧的专有名词essentials必须品，比如日常必需品Toiletries--洗漱用品 / 个人卫生用品

![[Pasted image 20260217193538.png|368]]

lintroller---

![[Pasted image 20260217194007.png]]

busking --- 跳韩舞的地方

![[Pasted image 20260217194625.png]]

data plan 手机出国用的流量套餐

![[Pasted image 20260217200146.png]]

tteokbokki—-年糕
韩式炒年糕

sesame seed 芝麻粒
entry.summary: 记录玩游戏的时候的美图
entry.title: 死亡搁浅2游玩
